title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: EQ preset and Custom EQ slider changes are heard in real time while music is playing, with Custom EQ taking effect on slider release
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device.
3. Tap on Audio Settings, then tap on Equalizer.
4. Play music on the connected Android device.
5. Tap on the 'Bass' preset and listen to the audio output.
6. Tap on the 'Flat' preset and listen to the audio output.
7. Tap on the 'Bright' preset and listen to the audio output.
9. Adjust one of the Custom EQ sliders and observe the audio output while dragging.
10. Release the Custom EQ slider and observe the audio output.
expected: Audio output changes in real time when selecting Bass, Flat, or Bright presets. For Custom EQ, audio changes are heard only after the user releases the slider.
